# Bankruptcy Lien Stripping - How Lien Stripping Works in Chapter 13 [2026] - Lienstripping
> Lien stripping removes underwater junior liens in Chapter 13 bankruptcy. Learn eligibility, valuation, and the stripping process. 2026 guide.

## About
lienstripping.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- What Happens to a Stripped Lien After Chapter 13 Discharge? - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/after-chapter-13.html
- Lien Stripping Case Law - Key Decisions by Circuit - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/case-law.html
- Cramdown: Reducing Secured Debts to Property Value - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/cramdown.html
- Lien Stripping Eligibility - Requirements and Limitations - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/eligibility.html
- How Lien Stripping Works in Chapter 13 Bankruptcy - Step by Step - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/how-it-works.html
- Bankruptcy Lien Stripping - How Lien Stripping Works in Chapter 13 [2026] - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/
- Lien Avoidance Under Section 522(f) - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/lien-avoidance.html
- Lien Stripping in Chapter 13 Bankruptcy - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/lien-stripping.html
- Strip Your Second Mortgage in Chapter 13 - The Complete Guide - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/second-mortgage.html
- Lien Stripping vs. Cramdown - What's the Difference? - Lienstripping: https://lienstripping.org/vs-cramdown.html
- Privacy Policy: https://lienstripping.org/privacy.html
